expectations.text: Explicitly identifies the N+1 problem as the cause
Explains that the loop produces roughly one query per item (order of N+1 round trips)
Recommends loading related rows in a single/batched query (IN / ANY / eager load) instead of per-item
expectations.evidence: Options A/B/C: relations, relationLoadStrategy 'query', In(...) batching

expectations.text: States a tradeoff or caveat for the recommended fix
expectations.evidence: Caveat on take + collection relations / leftJoinAndSelect fan-out
